decks.notes: The deck focuses on aggressive plays with a mix of disruptive elements to control the opponent's game plan. It includes powerful creatures like Phelia and Ragavan to apply pressure, supported by removal spells like Prismatic Ending and Galvanic Discharge. The deck also includes cards like Teferi, Time Raveler to disrupt the opponent's strategy and create tempo advantage. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with fast creatures while disrupting their game plan, leading to a quick victory.

The deck focuses on generating mana quickly through rituals and  rituals, while also utilizing card draw and selection through spells like Reckless Impulse and Glimpse the Impossible. The key idea is to quickly assemble the pieces needed to cast multiple spells in a turn, ideally leading to a game-winning combo with cards like Ral, Monsoon Mage. The deck also includes ways to recur key spells from the graveyard with Past in Flames, creating a powerful and explosive strategy that aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can react.

The deck focuses on creating a storm of spells by generating mana quickly and efficiently through cards like Ruby Medallion and Rituals. It aims to cast a large number of spells in a single turn, leading up to a massive Grapeshot or Ral, Monsoon Mage finish. The deck also benefits from Past in Flames to recast spells from the graveyard and Wrenn's Resolve for additional card draw and filtering. The key strategy is to chain together spells to create a lethal combo and overwhelm the opponent before they can respond.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana through Birthing Ritual to cast powerful creatures and control spells, creating a fast and efficient aggro strategy. Utilizing cards like Subtlety and Abhorrent Oculus for disruption, along with Coiling Oracle and Shardless Agent for card advantage, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a mix of aggression and control. Ice-Fang Coatl and Misty Rainforest provide additional value and flexibility, while cards like Flare of Denial and Force of Negation help protect the deck's key pieces. The goal is to outpace opponents and secure victory through tempo and resource advantage.

The deck focuses on aggressively disrupting the opponent's game plan by utilizing cards such as Galvanic Discharge, Teferi, Time Raveler, and Prismatic Ending to control the board and slow down the opponent. The creatures in the deck, such as Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, provide pressure and close out the game quickly. The deck also includes a strong element of card advantage with Fable of the Mirror-Breaker and Consign to Memory. The goal is to create a difficult board state for the opponent while maintaining a strong aggressive stance to win the game.

The deck is designed to aggressively disrupt opponent's strategies while building up a strong board presence with efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phage, Titan of Fire's Fury. It also aims to control the board through removal spells like Prismatic Ending and Consign to Memory, while generating value through cards like Quantum Riddler and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd. The deck also includes some protection and card advantage tools to maintain its tempo and pressure the opponent.

This deck focuses on combining aggressive creatures with disruptive elements to control the game and put pressure on the opponent. By utilizing efficient removal spells and powerful threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phage, Titan of Fire's Fury, the deck aims to rapidly reduce the opponent's life total while keeping the board under control. Cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Consign to Memory provide additional disruption, allowing for tempo swings in the player's favor. With a mix of aggro and control elements, this deck seeks to overwhelm opponents quickly and efficiently.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Boggart Trawler and Orcish Bowmasters, while disrupting their strategy with cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Despair. Cards like Necrodominance and Soul Spike provide additional finishers to quickly end the game. The deck also includes some control elements with cards like Psychic Frog and Fell the Profane to maintain board presence and disrupt the opponent's plans. The land base is designed to support the deck's mana requirements and ensure consistent plays.

The deck focuses on using various tutor spells and creatures like Allosaurus Rider to quickly assemble a powerful combo using Neoform and Eldritch Evolution to cheat out big creatures like Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant and Griselbrand. The deck also utilizes Planar Genesis to ramp up mana and overwhelm the opponent with a large board presence. It includes cards like Pact of Negation to protect key combo pieces and Boseiju, Who Endures to ensure important spells resolve. Overall, the deck aims to create explosive plays and win the game in a single turn.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through the use of powerful lands and Eldrazi creatures. It aims to assemble the UrzaTron lands (Urza's Mine, Power Plant, and Tower) to generate a large amount of mana quickly, allowing for early game plays and threats. It utilizes cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, the Spirit Dragon to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The Eldrazi creatures like Ulamog, the Ceaseless Hunger and Thought-Knot Seer provide powerful threats and disruption to further cement control over the game.

The deck focuses on generating a lot of mana quickly through spells like Pyretic Ritual and Ruby Medallion, allowing you to cast powerful spells like Ral, Monsoon Mage and Desperate Ritual. It also utilizes cards like Glimpse the Impossible and Wrenn's Resolve to draw through your deck and find the pieces you need to combo off, often using Past in Flames to re-cast key spells from your graveyard. The deck aims to build up to a big finish with cards like Grapeshot or Wish to close out the game in explosive fashion.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The deck also includes burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm for removal and finishing off the opponent. Additionally, the deck utilizes cards like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to create powerful board presence and overwhelm the opponent. Finally, cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker provide utility and card advantage to keep the pressure on the opponent.

The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly to play big threats like Primeval Titan and Cultivator Colossus. The key strategy is to use Amulet of Vigor to untap lands and gain additional mana advantage, allowing for explosive plays like casting multiple spells in a single turn. The deck also includes cards like Scapeshift and Green Sun's Zenith to search for specific pieces needed for the combo. With the right setup, the deck can quickly overwhelm opponents with its powerful creatures and land plays.

The primary focus of this deck is to establish a strong, aggressive board presence with a combination of low-cost creatures and powerful spells. This archetype aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly while also utilizing control elements to disrupt their game plan. Cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Flooded Strand allow for early aggression, while Leyline Binding and Tribal Flames provide removal and reach. The inclusion of powerful finishers like Scion of Draco and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury ensure that the deck can close out games quickly.

This deck focuses on utilizing land ramp and mana acceleration to quickly assemble the pieces needed to cast Primeval Titan and activate its powerful land tutoring ability. By utilizing cards such as Amulet of Vigor and Explore, the deck aims to create explosive turns where it can generate a massive amount of mana and quickly win the game by searching for key lands like Lotus Field and Gruul Turf. The synergy between land-based ramp spells and Primeval Titan's ability to tutor for important lands is the core strategy of this Combo - Amulet Titan deck.

This Jund aggro deck focuses on using disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Inquisition of Kozilek to control the opponent's hand while deploying efficient threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Tarmogoyf to apply pressure. The deck also utilizes powerful planeswalker Wrenn and Six to generate card advantage and removal spells like Unholy Heat and Abrupt Decay to deal with opposing threats. With a mana base optimized for consistency and a mix of disruption, removal, and aggressive creatures, this deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent and seize control of the game.
